The post [GitHub Advanced Security setup made simple](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-03-17-github-advanced-security-setup-made-simple) appeared first on [The GitHub Blog](https://github.blog).
Title: GitHub Advanced Security setup made simple
EnhancedContent:
GitHub Advanced Security is now easier to manage in organizations. A new guided experience helps you set up and configure Advanced Security, so you can now edit configurations and repository targeting faster than before.

To view detailed settings, select **Custom configuration** or open a configuration by name.

This is now available on GitHub Enterprise Cloud and will release to GitHub Enterprise Server 3.22.

Read the documentation to learn more about [enabling GitHub Advanced Security at scale](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest/code-security/concepts/security-at-scale/about-enabling-security-features-at-scale).
Author: Allison
